news.headline: Canine Companions pairs 8,000th service dog team at graduation ceremony; marks milestone.
news.summary: In Oceanside, California on August 9, 2024, Canine Companions celebrates a major achievement by pairing its 8,000th service dog team at the Southwest graduation ceremony. This organization, the leading service dog provider in the country, is currently conducting a series of six regional ceremonies.

Orbit International Corp. reports 2024 second quarter net loss of $201,000 ($0.06 loss per share) compared to prior year loss of $453,000 ($0.14 loss per share).
news.summary: In the second quarter of 2024, there was a net loss of $201,000, equivalent to a loss of $0.06 per share. This is a significant improvement compared to the prior year period, which had a net loss of $453,000, translating to a loss of $0.14 per share.

Tortoise Capital increases distributions for TYG & NTG closed-end funds, announces amounts and dates for several others.
news.summary: The distribution amounts and dates have been announced for several Tortoise energy funds listed on the NYSE. These include Tortoise Energy Infrastructure Corp. (TYG), with a distribution scheduled on [date] of [amount] per share. Tortoise Midstream Energy Fund, Inc. (NTG) will have a distribution of [amount] per share on [date]. The Tortoise Pipeline & Energy Fund, Inc. (TTP) will distribute [amount] per share on [date]. Additionally, Tortoise Energy Independence Fund, Inc. (NDP) is set to distribute [amount] per share on [date]. The Tortoise Power and Energy Infrastructure Fund does not have specific distribution information at this time.
